SEARCH
Package io.github.fiitgame.Enemy

Class Enemy

java.lang.Object
io.github.fiitgame.Enemy.Enemy
All Implemented Interfaces:
EnemyInterface
Direct Known Subclasses:
Skeleton, Slime
public abstract class Enemy extends Object implements EnemyInterface
The Enemy class is an abstract class that represents a generic enemy in the game. It implements the EnemyInterface and provides common properties and methods for all enemy types, such as health, damage, movement, and rendering.
